nasb.text: But evil men and impostors will proceed from bad to worse, deceiving and being deceived.

esv.text: while evil people and impostors will go on from bad to worse, deceiving and being deceived.

cnv.text: 但惡人和騙子必越來越壞，他們欺騙人，也必受欺騙。

ccb.text: 而恶人和骗子会变本加厉地迷惑人，也被人迷惑。

csbs.text: 而恶人和迷惑人的会越来越坏，他们迷惑人，自己也被迷惑。
